title: usecase.Claim (atomic + lease ID issuance) (CRITICAL PATH)
acceptance_criteria: Acquires per-item lock; reads item; rejects with ErrAlreadyClaimed if claim already set; writes claim object (agent, lease_id from IDGen, claimed_at, expires_at) and status=claimed via Store.Put with expectVersion.
Tests cover success path, already-claimed path, status-not-claimable path.
